description: A Quality Assurance specialist needs to review a completed batch record and its associated lab results to approve the batch for release to customers.

nodes.task_description: Select a batch from the 'Pending QA Review' queue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the batch record and all associated documentation.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all manufacturing steps were completed and signed off, and that all lab results are within specification.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the batch record is complete and all quality tests passed.

nodes.task_description: Apply an electronic signature to formally release the batch, changing its inventory status from 'Quarantine' to 'Available'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully releases the batch, making it available for sale.
